title: Wave 14 - Provider identity and availability persistence hardening
description: Coordinate Wave 14 execution to eliminate hardcoded provider identity in native flow, enforce backend actor resolution, and lock regression coverage for provider availability persistence.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 14 ticket set is defined for architect/backend/mobile/qa with clear dependency order
Execution checkpoints include branch isolation, PR gate, and Jira traceability
Wave 14 rollout risks and rollback notes are documented
